# Swt

**Summary**: A wavelet transform that provides a redundant but translation-invariant representation of the signal.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023]] evaluated SWT as an alternative to CWT for feature extraction due to its lower computational cost.

## Key Results and Findings

- SWT was considered because it is computationally less expensive than CWT while providing similar results in some contexts. ([[2023-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2023, p. 55]])
